sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Chipotle opens its newest Pensacola location on Tuesday. Here's where
feed.summary: A new Chipotle location is set to open in Pensacola on February 17 at 3240 W. Michigan Ave., featuring a "Chipotlane" drive-thru for digital order pickups and new high-protein menu options. This opening marks an expansion of Chipotle's presence in the Pensacola area, with another location already approved for Ransley Station. The restaurant will offer a limited-time special, Chicken Al Pastor, and is actively hiring for about 30 positions.

feed.title: Avista Files for Annual Electric Rate Adjustment in Idaho, Proposing 7.4% Increase
feed.summary: Avista Corporation is seeking to increase electric revenues by 7.4%, or $25.2 million, in Idaho, effective May 1, 2026, to fund its energy efficiency programs. This adjustment would raise the average residential customer's monthly bill by 7.7%, from $115.54 to $124.44. The proposal is currently under public review by the Idaho Public Utilities Commission, and customers are invited to submit comments.

feed.title: QSG Stock Price, News & Analysis | QUANTASING GROUP
feed.summary: QuantaSing Group Limited (QSG) has undergone a significant strategic transformation, rebranding to Here Group Limited with the new ticker symbol HERE, effective November 11, 2025. This pivot involves shedding its online learning and consumer businesses to focus exclusively on its pop toy business, primarily through its investment in Shenzhen Yiqi Culture Co., Ltd. (Letsvan). The company aims to become a pure-play pop toy company, expanding its IP portfolio, including its flagship WAKUKU, and pursuing product-driven growth.

feed.title: First Solar Inquiry Puts Governance And Valuation In Investor Focus
feed.summary: Pomerantz LLP has initiated an investigation into First Solar (NasdaqGS:FSLR) concerning potential securities fraud, focusing on whether shareholders were harmed by possible misstatements. This inquiry particularly highlights corporate governance and disclosure quality, urging investors to monitor the company's response and any further legal developments.
